scripts.dev: concurrently -n inventory,hr,finance,sales,analytics,backend,frontend -c blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow,white,red "npm run dev -w services/inventory-service" "npm run dev -w services/hr-service" "npm run dev -w services/finance-service" "npm run dev -w services/sales-service" "python3 -m uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir services/analytics-service --reload --port 5001" "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w services/inventory-service && npm run build -w services/hr-service && npm run build -w services/finance-service && npm run build -w services/sales-service && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w services/inventory-service && npm run typecheck -w services/hr-service && npm run typecheck -w services/finance-service && npm run typecheck -w services/sales-service && npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend
